DP.036.0000:
Isn’t my Pokétch quite fetching?\f
A Trainer would be simply lost without
a Pokétch, after all.
DP.036.0003:
Oh, your Pokémon is quite adorable!\f
Here, try making it hold this
[0108,0000].\f
DP.036.0004:
A Pokémon holding that Quick Claw can
sometimes attack first, even if it\r
is normally a little bit slow.\f
There are other items that are only
useful when given to a Pokémon.\f
Try finding other items that you can
make your Pokémon hold.\f
...I sound like I’m a teacher or
something.
